note: UniswapX reactor settlement surface triage. SignedOrder.order is an opaque bytes payload whose family-specific struct is decoded in a later Tier-B pass; these entrypoints are still COVER so wallet traffic routes to an explicit Unknown fail-closed action instead of missing the registry.

0x3f62192e.name: execute
0x3f62192e.reason: filler settles one signed UniswapX order; route conservatively as Unknown until SignedOrder inner bytes semantics are decoded

0x0d7a16c3.name: executeBatch
0x0d7a16c3.reason: filler settles a batch of signed UniswapX orders; route conservatively as Unknown until SignedOrder inner bytes semantics are decoded

0x13fb72c7.name: executeBatchWithCallback
0x13fb72c7.reason: callback-enabled batch reactor settlement; route conservatively as Unknown because callback data and inner order bytes need Tier-B semantics

0x0d335884.name: executeWithCallback
0x0d335884.reason: callback-enabled single reactor settlement; route conservatively as Unknown because callback data and inner order bytes need Tier-B semantics

0x2d771389.name: setProtocolFeeController
0x2d771389.reason: owner/protocol fee administration, not an end-user wallet settlement intent

0xf2fde38b.name: transferOwnership
0xf2fde38b.reason: owner administration, not an end-user wallet settlement intent
